articles.title: UNDRR February 2026 newsletter
articles.description: This month from UNDRR: Commemorating the 2023 Türkiye earthquake, Harnessing AI to tackle complexity of disaster risks, Promoting disability-inclusion in urban resilience, and much more.

articles.title: Verture
articles.description: Verture is a Scottish climate resilience charity that aims to help people thrive as the climate changes by creating connections, actions and insights for a fairer and smarter future.

articles.title: Disaster resilience of small- and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs)
articles.description: Disaster resilience of small- and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs)

articles.title: From warning to action: Strengthening risk data and early warning systems in Timor-Leste
articles.description: A project in Timor-Leste supported national authorities to strengthen disaster loss data systems, assess how early warnings reach communities, and improve institutional coordination, helping build more effective early warning and disaster risk management.

articles.title: UNDRR & ARISE Japan joint symposium 2026: Strengthening disaster risk reduction by advancing investment in resilience and translating science into Practical Action
articles.description: This year’s ARISE Japan Public Symposium is scaled up into a Joint Symposium by the United Nations Office for Disaster Risk Reduction (UNDRR) Kobe Office and ARISE Japan, featuring a two-part programme.

articles.title: Journal of Catastrophe Risk and Resilience
articles.description: The Journal of Catastrophe Risk and Resilience (JCRR), is a diamond open-access interdisciplinary research journal with a broad remit encompassing natural hazards, catastrophe risk, and the societal and institutional response to their management.

articles.title: Our work and what we do
articles.description: UNDRR is the lead UN entity for the coordination of disaster risk reduction. We help decision makers across the globe better understand and act on risk.
